programme.title: Love on the Menu

programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in Texan waters.

programme.title: Hooked on Africa
programme.desc: The unspoilt wilderness of South Africa's Eastern Cape coastline takes you back to when time was measured by the tides and little else mattered, except the lure of the myriad species to be found off the rocks and in the abundant estuaries.

programme.title: Hooked on Travel
programme.desc: The estuaries of Angola are the nursery for all fish that roam off its cold Atlantic seaboard, and it's where in certain seasons the Jacks and Tarpon are to be found. Tommo and Wes split up to experiment in two of Angola's most prolific waterways.

programme.title: Reel Africa
programme.desc: The coastline surrounding Port Elizabeth is part of the beautiful Wild Coast and is a preferred fishing destination for many an angler.

programme.title: Inside Angling
programme.desc: The upper section of the Zambezi River, while difficult to get to, never fails to deliver a fantastic fishing experience. We go in search of Africa's Piranha and come face to face with the business end of this freshwater monster.

programme.title: Wild Fly
programme.desc: Few wilderness destinations compare to the mighty Zambezi, where ferocious tigerfish are found in crocodile infested waters. The Wildfly Team experience an incredible journey in amongst Africa's wildlife.
